name: The Sol Foundation Holds Its Second Annual UAP Symposium
summary: The Sol Foundation convened its second annual symposium in San Francisco, featuring scientific, policy, philosophical, and government-focused sessions on UAP. Garry Nolan organized and spoke at the event, while Jacques Vallée participated in a plenary discussion.

relationships.context: Organized the symposium and presented on standards of evidence
Participated in a plenary fireside conversation
Focused on scientific standards and UAP research
